    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]

        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

    SELECT [v].[Id], [v].[AccountHolderName], [v].[AccountNumber], [v].[Address], [v].[BankName], [v].[BranchName], [v].[CompanyName], [v].[ContactPerson], [v].[CreatedOn], [v].[Email], [v].[GSTNumber], [v].[IFSCCode], [v].[IsActive], [v].[IsDeleted], [v].[PANNumber], [v].[PaymentMethod], [v].[PaymentTerms], [v].[Phone], [v].[PreferredCurrency], [v].[SwiftCode], [v].[UpdatedOn], [v].[VendorName]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CreatedOn], [t].[Email], [t].[FullName], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[PasswordHash], [t].[RefreshToken], [t].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [t].[UpdatedOn], [t].[VendorId], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[AssignedBy], [t0].[AssignedOn], [t0].[Id], [t0].[Color], [t0].[CreatedOn], [t0].[Description], [t0].[Icon], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsSystemRole], [t0].[Name], [t0].[Priority], [t0].[UpdatedOn], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId], [t0].[AssignedBy0], [t0].[AssignedOn0], [t0].[Id0], [t0].[Code], [t0].[CreatedOn0], [t0].[Description0], [t0].[IsActive0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[Module], [t0].[Name0], [t0].[UpdatedOn0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[Id], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId]

    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

    SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]

        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CreatedOn], [t].[Email], [t].[FullName], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[PasswordHash], [t].[RefreshToken], [t].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [t].[UpdatedOn], [t].[VendorId], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[AssignedBy], [t0].[AssignedOn], [t0].[Id], [t0].[Color], [t0].[CreatedOn], [t0].[Description], [t0].[Icon], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsSystemRole], [t0].[Name], [t0].[Priority], [t0].[UpdatedOn], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId], [t0].[AssignedBy0], [t0].[AssignedOn0], [t0].[Id0], [t0].[Code], [t0].[CreatedOn0], [t0].[Description0], [t0].[IsActive0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[Module], [t0].[Name0], [t0].[UpdatedOn0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]

        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[Id], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]

        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Color], [t].[CreatedOn], [t].[Description], [t].[Icon], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[IsSystemRole], [t].[Name], [t].[Priority], [t].[UpdatedOn], [u].[UserId], [u].[RoleId], [u].[AssignedBy], [u].[AssignedOn], [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn]
FROM (
    SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    ORDER BY [r].[Priority], [r].[Name], [r].[Id]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [UserRoles] AS [u] ON [t].[Id] = [u].[RoleId]

    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CreatedOn], [t].[Email], [t].[FullName], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[PasswordHash], [t].[RefreshToken], [t].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [t].[UpdatedOn], [t].[VendorId], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[AssignedBy], [t0].[AssignedOn], [t0].[Id], [t0].[Color], [t0].[CreatedOn], [t0].[Description], [t0].[Icon], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsSystemRole], [t0].[Name], [t0].[Priority], [t0].[UpdatedOn], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId], [t0].[AssignedBy0], [t0].[AssignedOn0], [t0].[Id0], [t0].[Code], [t0].[CreatedOn0], [t0].[Description0], [t0].[IsActive0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[Module], [t0].[Name0], [t0].[UpdatedOn0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[Id], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[Id], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]

2026-07-17 21:04:13.956 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (29ms) [Parameters=[@__email_0='?' (Size = 4000)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CreatedOn], [t].[Email], [t].[FullName], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[PasswordHash], [t].[RefreshToken], [t].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [t].[UpdatedOn], [t].[VendorId], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[AssignedBy], [t0].[AssignedOn], [t0].[Id], [t0].[Color], [t0].[CreatedOn], [t0].[Description], [t0].[Icon], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsSystemRole], [t0].[Name], [t0].[Priority], [t0].[UpdatedOn]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Email] = @__email_0
) AS [t]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CreatedOn], [t].[Email], [t].[FullName], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[PasswordHash], [t].[RefreshToken], [t].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [t].[UpdatedOn], [t].[VendorId], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[AssignedBy], [t0].[AssignedOn], [t0].[Id], [t0].[Color], [t0].[CreatedOn], [t0].[Description], [t0].[Icon], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsSystemRole], [t0].[Name], [t0].[Priority], [t0].[UpdatedOn], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId], [t0].[AssignedBy0], [t0].[AssignedOn0], [t0].[Id0], [t0].[Code], [t0].[CreatedOn0], [t0].[Description0], [t0].[IsActive0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[Module], [t0].[Name0], [t0].[UpdatedOn0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[Id], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[Id], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]

        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]

        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]

        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CreatedOn], [t].[Email], [t].[FullName], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[PasswordHash], [t].[RefreshToken], [t].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [t].[UpdatedOn], [t].[VendorId], [t0].[UserId], [t0].[RoleId], [t0].[AssignedBy], [t0].[AssignedOn], [t0].[Id], [t0].[Color], [t0].[CreatedOn], [t0].[Description], [t0].[Icon], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsSystemRole], [t0].[Name], [t0].[Priority], [t0].[UpdatedOn], [t0].[RoleId0], [t0].[PermissionId], [t0].[AssignedBy0], [t0].[AssignedOn0], [t0].[Id0], [t0].[Code], [t0].[CreatedOn0], [t0].[Description0], [t0].[IsActive0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[Module], [t0].[Name0], [t0].[UpdatedOn0]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (

        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]

    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [UserRoles] AS [u] ON [t].[Id] = [u].[RoleId]
LEFT JOIN [RolePermissions] AS [r0] ON [t].[Id] = [r0].[RoleId]
ORDER BY [t].[Priority], [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [u].[UserId], [u].[RoleId], [r0].[RoleId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Color], [t].[CreatedOn], [t].[Description], [t].[Icon], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[IsSystemRole], [t].[Name], [t].[Priority], [t].[UpdatedOn], [u].[UserId], [u].[RoleId], [u].[AssignedBy], [u].[AssignedOn], [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn]
FROM (
    SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn]
    FROM [Roles] AS [r]
    ORDER BY [r].[Priority], [r].[Name], [r].[Id]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [UserRoles] AS [u] ON [t].[Id] = [u].[RoleId]
LEFT JOIN [RolePermissions] AS [r0] ON [t].[Id] = [r0].[RoleId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedOn], [u].[Email], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[UpdatedOn], [u].[VendorId]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[UserId], [u0].[RoleId], [u0].[AssignedBy], [u0].[AssignedOn], [r].[Id], [r].[Color], [r].[CreatedOn], [r].[Description], [r].[Icon], [r].[IsActive], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsSystemRole], [r].[Name], [r].[Priority], [r].[UpdatedOn], [t1].[RoleId] AS [RoleId0], [t1].[PermissionId], [t1].[AssignedBy] AS [AssignedBy0], [t1].[AssignedOn] AS [AssignedOn0], [t1].[Id] AS [Id0], [t1].[Code], [t1].[CreatedOn] AS [CreatedOn0], [t1].[Description] AS [Description0], [t1].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t1].[Module], [t1].[Name] AS [Name0], [t1].[UpdatedOn] AS [UpdatedOn0]
    FROM [UserRoles] AS [u0]
    INNER JOIN [Roles] AS [r] ON [u0].[RoleId] = [r].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [r0].[RoleId], [r0].[PermissionId], [r0].[AssignedBy], [r0].[AssignedOn], [p].[Id], [p].[Code], [p].[CreatedOn], [p].[Description], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Module], [p].[Name], [p].[UpdatedOn]
        FROM [RolePermissions] AS [r0]
        INNER JOIN [Permissions] AS [p] ON [r0].[PermissionId] = [p].[Id]
    ) AS [t1] ON [r].[Id] = [t1].[RoleId]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
